programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky needs a ballet dancer and a burlesque comic for his club's new musical revue. Lucy wants the ballet gig and takes dance lessons from a strict instructor. Learning the disciplined art is much more difficult than she imagined.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Peggy, a teenage neighbor, breaks up with her boyfriend Arthur because she is infatuated with Ricky. Lucy tries to help the clumsy schoolboy learn how to dance in order to win back Peggy's affections. To complicate matters more, Arthur falls for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After the Mertzes have a quarrel the Ricardos try their best to get them back together. Lucy invites each of them to dinner without the other knowing. The Mertzes finally reconcile but in the process, the Ricardos squabble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy hates the mustache that Ricky grows for a potential movie role and demands that he shave it off. When he refuses, Lucy gets a fake beard and glues it on her face. To teach Ricky a lesson, she kisses her husband with the beard on when he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky forbids Lucy from gossiping, she tapes her mouth shut but reveals the latest rumor to Ethel through charades. However, it seems it's the proverbial black pot and kettle when Ricky shares with Fred a spicy tidbit about one of his band members.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are tired of their dishpan hands and demand dishwashers from their husbands. They also don't think the Society Matrons League, a club they want to join, would approve. Their husbands believe they have it easy compared to the olden days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.desc: A demon emerges in the present day with Setsuna, Towa’s twin, and the bounty hunter Moroha in tow. Seeing Setsuna in trouble awakens Towa’s latent demon powers.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa decides to return to the feudal era to help Setsuna regain her memories. The trio enter the corridor leading to the feudal era, but within it awaits the spirit of a certain priestess.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa and Setsuna take on a request to slay Jakotsumaru, a boy who has been extracting bones from humans and beasts in order to revive his father, the demon beast Tokotsu.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Travelers are going missing one after another. Towa, Setsuna, and Moroha head to the northern mountains to crack the case, but instead, they find a village completely overrun by ghost cats!

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: On her way to search for the Dream Butterfly, Towa meets a strange young man named Riku. Towa offers him an apple, and in thanks, Riku presents her with the genuine Kikujumonji sword.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: After fleeing from the deputy shogun’s estate, Yotsume borrows the power of a Rainbow Pearl to unleash his Dream Gazing spell upon the Half-Demon Princesses, who are hot on his trail.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Moroha accepts a job to slay Konton, a member of the Four Perils said to have defeated Meioju, a demon beast with the ultimate armored shell.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The Half-Demon Princesses are tasked with slaying Kinka and Ginka, conjoined twins of the Ka Demon Tribe whose battles for dominance have been wreaking havoc everywhere.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Something wicked lurks in the Man-Eating Pond, devouring any human, beast, or bird that comes near. Towa and Setsuna meet Hikomaru and Chiyo, siblings who lost their parents to the pond.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: The demon Nikosen was a sage before evil consumed his soul. Konton orders him to kill the Half-Demon Princesses. Towa struggles as her demon powers fade and she turns into a human.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: When a demon begins to devour virtuous monks and Shinto priests in the region, Hisui is assigned to guard his father, Miroku, who has been undergoing harsh training for the past two years.

programme.title: Yashahime: Princess Half-Demon
programme.desc: Towa and Setsuna set off to slay Homura, an evil mountain god who has abducted a beautiful maiden. The twins learn that Homura was involved in the forest fire that separated them.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, las bandas de drogas aterrorizaron Harlem, los vecindarios de Nueva York.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una inmigrante adolescente fue a los Estados Unidos para cumplir su sueño de convertirse en doctora. Pero un giro trágico del destino intervino cuando se convirtió en una víctima inocente del comercio de las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A mitad de los años 90, una banda de ladrones profesionales de bancos realizó ataques en ciudades a lo largo de siete estados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un día que comenzó con un paseo escolar al campo terminó con la peor pesadilla para los padres. Una niña de once años había desaparecido. Sus padres estaban seguros de que no se trataba de una huida.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1998, una mujer acaudalada de Jackson, Misisipi, desapareció de su casa a plena luz del día. Solo quedó una misteriosa nota al azar con doce nombres y sin instrucciones específicas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Arizona, un cargamento de dinero desapareció en el desierto junto con los dos hombres contratados para vigilarlo. El FBI no sabía si los guardias eran participantes o víctimas de una emboscada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los ochenta, las importaciones de cocaína en Florida estaban entre las más altas del país. El homicidio y la intimidación se impusieron en los territorios.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Kokomo, Indiana, un crimen impensable aterrorizó a los residentes. Una mujer fue secuestrada de su casa una clara mañana de primavera.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore Family is back to break down another epic vacation. The shoremates break down all the big moments from this season and Angelina unexpectedly sounds off on her roommates. We love reunions this time of year!

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The reunion and the Mardi Gras madness continue! The girls' friendships are in jeopardy, Vinny gets sentimental, and the fans put the crew in the hot seat. It all goes down on part two of the reunion!

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Summer at the Jersey Shore kicks off when eight housemates move into their summer share. Romance heats up between Sammy and Mike, but all might be lost when the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Still feeling like the outcast, Snookie tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. And the roommates' first night out at the club gets flirty, proving that the boyfriends back home might have something to worry about.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Paulie and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Snookie's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together and she finally feels like she is a part of the family. Meanwhile, Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: When Mike invites girls back to the house, the situation gets out of control, and Snooki gets into her second fight of the summer. Meanwhile, Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew heads to Miami! Angelina arrives and the drama quickly picks up where it left off in Seaside. Tension is high between Ron and Sam and she is left brokenhearted while he gets crazy at the club.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie REALLY did at the club the night before, but no one is saying. And when Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Angelina swallows her pride and apologizes to the girls. Back at the house, Mike, Vinny, and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Ron's bad behavior puts Snooki, Angelina, and Jwoww in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an anonymous letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's anonymous letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie -- at least for now. Meanwhile, Mike, Vinny, and Pauly (MVP) have their hands full juggling four girls in one night.

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. After spending another night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little-known fact about her pinkeye-prone cuddle-buddy.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provocatively.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Jada is suing her mother for $4,000 in unreturned property after kicking her out of the house.

programme.title: Judge Mathis

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Sharee moved in with Brandon shortly after they met, had a child and still no marriage. Brandon wants her to get a full-time job and not work part-time in their business before they get married.

programme.title: Divorce Court

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Tamika and Joseph have been together 7 years before marrying, but now his gambling addiction plus their new baby has worn the two out. Joseph’s excessive gambling habits are draining their life’s savings and he refuses to get the help he needs.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Briana is suspicious of Geovani because she claims he is way too sexual and can’t keep his hands off her. She thinks that if he has that much drive for her, how could he not have it for other women.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Jim claims Toni is not fulfilling her wifely duties. Toni says Jim is disrespectful and calls her names. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two dissolve their marriage respectfully?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Jordan says that Taurean is the biggest player with the ladies and still decides to lie about it even after she gave him a chance to have an open relationship. He says he talks to other women because Jordan is unaffectionate and verbally abusive.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Yaminah suffered from post-partum depression and says Tremaine wasn't there for her when she needed him. Tremaine blames a violent upbringing for his communication problems.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Melissa says Doug is having an affair with her best friend. Doug claims that is not true and he did not cheat on her. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam get the truth?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Taylore and Ravaun met on Instagram and got married 8 months later. Now, Taylore claims Ravaun is back on social media and hooking up with other women.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Tony Claims Angel started cheating on him as early as 2 weeks into their marriage. Now, Angel has brought the same man she was caught cheating with, to court with her. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam be able to keep things civilized?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Elizabeth claims Charles is a sex addict who got her sick while she was pregnant! Charles has moved on with a new girlfriend and wants out of his marriage! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam bring this husband and wife to an amicable agreement?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Justin has had a crush on Erica ever since he was 13 years old. Fast forward 15 years and they're a couple. But after a year together, Justin cheated and Erica says he tries to control her every move.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plans to throw the country into economic chaos! With a molecular regenerator at his fingertips, Cobra commander plans to disintegrate U.S. currency and replace it with Cobra coin. Flint, Ripcord, and Ace jump into action to help cancel these checks.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra kidnaps people with paranormal powers for a battalion of "Special Recruits," hoping to use their incredible gifts against the Joes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra attacks the U.S. treasury's printing plant, but its not money they're after. Cobra commander wants fort Knox's top-secret blueprints in order to stage the most incredible robbery of all time! That is, unless the Joes can stop this gold rush.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra mounts an attack on the oil fields of a Middle Eastern kingdom. When the Joe team responds, their skystrikers are torn apart in midair by Cobra's sonic scrambler, a soundwave device powerful enough to shatter weapons and vehicles into pieces.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra uses a dude ranch as a base of operations to seize a government solar energy project. Once they have it under their control, Cobra commander plans to harness the power of the sun itself to wreak destruction on the western United States!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint, Lady Jaye, Cobra commander and the Baroness are kidnapped by a demented and powerful genius. On his private island, they battle deadly life-sized toys in a game with only one possible winner...until they do the unthinkable: team up!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Quick kick gives a martial arts demonstration on a college campus, Amber, a student, wants to join the Joe team. When she tries to prove her worth by taking on Cobra by herself, the Joes have to teach her - and Cobra - what teamwork is all about.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals a dangerous bacterium that proves resistant to antibiotics. But when it's accidentally exposed to air and grows to monstrous proportions, Airtight and the rest of the Joes must battle this giant germ before it causes massive destruction.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A mysterious series of telephone tips about “The Viper” sends the Joes across the globe, raiding one Cobra operation after another to prevent attack. But when they learn Cobra is not responsible for the messages, they have to find out exactly who is.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When the Baroness acquires a legendary conch and uses its mind-controlling siren song on all the males among Joe and Cobra's ranks, it's up to Scarlett, Lady Jaye and Cover Girl to end her reign of terror.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Tokyo is the site of a world economic conference - and Cobra's latest target for chaos. When Cobra devises a plan to destroy the whole city with an earthquake, the Joes are sent in to stop them.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. When G.I. Joe captures a secret Cobra explosive, Cobra responds by kidnapping several Joe family members and brainwashing them into fighting a battle for its return. It's a strike force the Joes are afraid to fight or harm.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. The Joes are caught off-balance when their very families and personal lives are used against them. To defeat Cobra, retrieve the explosive, and rescue their loved ones, the Joes not only have to be tough, but creative too.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Bazooka watches a monstrous creature rise from the water and devour what looks like a giant firefly. Unfortunately, none of the Joes believe him, until it's revealed that this "sea serpent" is a Cobra-built submarine!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: After an air duel, Storm Shadow crashes into a lake in the north of Britain. He's rescued from his sinking plane by an apparition who guides him to the legendary sword Excalibur resting on the lake bottom. With the sword, Storm Shadow will be unstoppable!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Disillusioned by constant battle, Stealer is ready to resign from the Joe team. He gains new perspective when a Cobra weapon malfunctions and opens a rift between realities, throwing him and the Joes into a world where Cobra is in control.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Trapped in the alternate Cobra - controlled world, the Joes find an unlikely ally in the Baroness. With her help, Stealer, Clutch and the others search for a way back to their own reality. But Cobra is closing in…

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Mr. Arnold and the Super K's are teleported to an alternate world where everything is opposite!

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: A Super K royal visit with Princess Zamunda turns chaotic when her priceless tiara goes missing.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: A geography lesson and a story about Mr. Arnold's long lost love leads to an adventure in Paris to save the city from the dastardly Joan of Dark.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: When Patty, Billy, and Vik are abducted by aliens, Mr. Arnold and the rest of the Super Ks must race to save them from the most dangerous talent show in the universe.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: The mysterious origin of Captain Fantastic and his rivalry with Dr. Superior is finally revealed.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: The Super Ks take a trip to Austria with Mr. Arnold to solve the mystery of the missing mini horse.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra has developed the ultimate weapon… the M.A.S.S. Device, capable of beaming and transporting troops, weapon and resources anywhere in the world. When Cobra uses the device to steal a military satellite, G.I. Joe is called into action.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 3 of 5. As Duke recovers from his injuries, Snake Eyes wanders the arctic, poisoned by the radioactive crystal elements he recovered from a Cobra trap. But can Snake Eyes survive the radiation arctic conditions and dangers that await him?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 4 of 5. After Cobra Commander squanders his resources, both Cobra and G.I. Joe are desperate to get their hands on the final element needed to fuel the M.A.S.S. Device. It's Joe versus Cobra at themouth of an active volcano, winner take all!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. Destro returns to Cobra Mountain with Scarlett as his prisoner. As he takes control of the operation from Cobra Commander, the stakes are raised for the Joe team to stop them once and for all with an all-out assault on Cobra Mountain!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 5. Cobra attacks a G.I. Joe convoy and steals a high-powered experimental laser to complete their latest weapon... the weather dominator. When the Joes launch an air assault, Destro uses the device, and it's stormy skies ahead for the Joe team.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: "What Now?" All Access
programme.desc: An exclusive behind-the-scenes look at Kevin Hart's 2016 record-breaking "What Now?" international stand-up tour. With unparalleled access, this documentary takes you on tour and inside the superstar's life to reveal a side of him you've never seen.

programme.desc: Pharmacist by day and professional comedian by night, Lavar Walker takes us on a journey of laughter about his life at the local drug store and all of the characters he encounters on a daily basis.

programme.title: That's Funny

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood
programme.desc: Oliver tries his hand at stand-up, and Kevin tries to unnerve him by inviting his friend, Chris Rock, to Oliver's open mic debut.

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood
programme.desc: Still looking for high-wattage love, Kevin joins a celebrity online dating service.

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood

programme.title: Real Husbands Of Hollywood
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when Tisha and Nicole reluctantly join forces with Eva Marcille and Kevin's exes, Nadine Velasquez and Bridgette, to plan a promotional baby shower for Selita — to be televised on Nick's Ncredible Network.

programme.title: Beyblade Metal Masters
programme.desc: Zeo is defeated in battle by Ryuga.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrives at a cavern overrun by thieves, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade.

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven
programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: Chop Kick Panda
programme.desc: A lazy panda named Zibo dreams of becoming a martial arts master but is stuck as a cleaner for a dojo. Little does he know that an evil tiger has plans to take over the kingdom and only Zibo can stop him in this fun adventure!

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven 2
programme.desc: Charlie and Itchy are back! Those lovable mutts from the treasured Family hit "All Dogs Go To Heaven" return for an all-new Animated Musical Adventure. Features the voices of Charlie Sheen, Dom DeLuise and Sheena Easton.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Day of the Departed
programme.desc: Cole returns to Yang’s haunted temple to seek revenge on the former Airjitzu Master who turned him into a ghost, he accidentally uses a Dark Magic blade that unleashes the spectral forms of Ninjago’s greatest villains and traps himself in the temple!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: La actividad final hace arder a la multitud y la casa tiembla con una pelea entre Haeixa, Let y JV. El último día, todos disfrutan de un súper brunch, con muchas lágrimas. Cierran la temporada sacudiendo botines en el programa de Ryan Castro.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: El futuro pinta bien para Gold & Silver con una pintura de Marc Chagall que le llama la atención a Rick. ¿Obtendrá esta obra maestra o acabará con un trato descolorido? Más tarde, Rick intenta comprar un anillo de la Serie Mundial de los Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: Los secretos de la civilización
programme.desc: El repentino colapso de múltiples civilizaciones hace 3200 años se debió al cambio climático?

programme.desc: Cómo una explosión de civilizaciones de siglos en todo el Mediterráneo creó el Imperio Romano.

programme.title: Los secretos de la civilización
programme.desc: Cómo la ciencia sopesa la evidencia del impacto de las plagas catastróficas en el Imperio Romano.

programme.title: Perú: Sacrificios en el reino de Chimor
programme.desc: Un descubrimiento de cientos de niños sacrificados en Perú descubre los secretos de una de las civilizaciones más poderosas y misteriosas.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick cree que vale la pena comprar la primera moneda estadounidense, pero le va a costar una gran cantidad de dinero. Corey y Chum le ven futuro a una lonchera antigua de la serie animada "Los supersónicos" que llega deslizándose por el mostrador.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick mataría por tener un sombrero y una pistola que pertenecían a uno de los hombres de los que se sospechaba que era Jack el Destripador. Corey trabaja horas extra para adquirir un reloj de 1920.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Para celebrar el episodio número 500 de la serie El precio de la historia, Rick considera invertir capital en la capital de la nación. Para empezar, quiere adquirir un juego de cucharas de plata creadas por el patriota estadounidense Paul Revere.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor llega con un biciclo antiguo que pone a Rick a rodar: ¿decidirá que este trato vale la pena o le dará la vuelta? A Chum le toca el lado filoso del trato en el momento en que le vende una katana japonesa a Dana White, el presidente de la UFC.

programme.title: Boleto al futuro
programme.desc: El cielo ya no es el límite: descubre el futuro con nuevas formas de transporte. La tecnología está reinventando el movimiento y desafiando las leyes de la física como nunca antes.

programme.title: Vida Tras Las Estrellas
programme.desc: Un viaje personal para descubrir uno de los fenómenos más impresionantes y menos conocidos de la naturaleza: los rayos cósmicos. Una lluvia oculta de partículas súper energéticas que une nuestras vidas con fenómenos espectaculares.

programme.title: La vida secreta de los gatos grandes
programme.desc: Los leones, conocidos por su extraordinaria sociabilidad, forman manadas de hasta 35 miembros. Sin embargo, en Masai Mara, Kenia, hoy sobreviven menos de 15,000, tras una alarmante disminución del 75 % en apenas medio siglo.

programme.title: La vida secreta de los gatos grandes
programme.desc: El leopardo, como muchos de los grandes felinos, domina el arte del sigilo. Es una sombra entre las sombras, casi imposible de ver, pues su supervivencia depende de volverse invisible al acechar a sus presas.

programme.title: Bichos espeluznantes
programme.desc: Los insectos son la base de la cadena alimentaria. Son alimento para casi todo, pero para comenzar el proceso, ellos también deben comer.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Enriquecidos por su experiencia, aquellos que transportan la ciudad de Nueva York revelan sus lugares favoritos, sabiduría, consejos y secretos a la ciudad del movimiento perpetuo que conocen tan bien.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Muscat, el Cuerno de África, los sultanes, el camino del incienso, el estrecho de Ormuz, el Océano Índico y el “desierto de los desiertos” excitan la imaginación y son sinónimos de las leyendas del pasado de Omán.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony emprende un peregrinaje a Sídney, Australia, para disfrutar de una comida preparada por uno de los mejores chefs del mundo: Tetsuya Wakuda.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Polonia ha superado mucha adversidad y tiene una historia fascinante. Sus múltiples facetas revelan un país lleno de sorpresas. Este es un retrato cautivador de Polonia y de un pueblo en transformación.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Los valles fértiles y los sitios arqueológicos del Líbano dan testimonio de la importancia histórica del país. A pesar de la devastación en numerosos conflictos, Líbano, país de cedro, siempre se ha levantado de nuevo con orgullo.

programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to help a veteran FBI agent track down a con man who has eluded him for years. Also, Agent McGowan hands down his decision on Charlie's security clearance and Don's future with the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team hunts a crew stealing high-end goods from a shipping service and looks to an employee with savant-like abilities to lead them to those behind the scheme. Also, when one of Don's men is killed on duty, he questions his faith in the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on a date, David catches a disappearing act at a magic show but quickly becomes involved in the performance when the magician really vanishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the death of a family friend is ruled an accident, Don and Charlie investigate, only to make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: Who are these people that venture into space? Once they were test pilots, then scientists and engineers now teachers, politicians and paying tourists what does it take to earn the astronaut wings?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living with Space
programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Atmosphere

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Flags Of Our Fathers
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: For a decade, an elite team of intelligence and military operatives, working in secret across the globe, devoted themselves to a single goal: to find and eliminate Osama bin Laden. ZERO DARK THIRTY tells the story of history's greatest manhunt.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: For his final assignment, a top temporal agent must pursue the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time. The chase turns into a unique, surprising and mind-bending exploration of love, fate, identity and time travel taboos.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past. Rated-R

programme.title: Layer Cake

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.desc: As Sheppard and Ronon are trapped beneath a collapsed compound, McKay and Lorne are trapped in another pocket of debris. Michael’s flagship Wraith Cruiser hurtles towards the compound, while Carter leads a rescue mission. Who will reach them first?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Keller fails to report for her shift, concerned team members are shocked to discover her unconscious in her quarters. With the situation on Atlantis escalating, Woolsey is ultimately faced with a decision that could cost Keller her life.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission, Ronon (Jason Momoa) is ambushed and captured by his former friend, Tyre (Mark Dacascos), and turned over to the Wraith. As the team scrambles for leads to locate their friend, Ronon undergoes a torturous ordeal.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A drive malfunction aboard a mysterious duplicate Daedalus sends the team jumping through various alternate realities where they encounter sinister alien life forms, a searing sun, and a pitched space battle over Atlantis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After a series of anomalies and power disruptions, the Atlantis team is faced with an impossible decision: to create the means to release an mysterious entity or stand by as it systematically destroys the city’s technological infrastructure.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On a flight back to Atlantis, McKay inexplicably falls ill. Fearing the worst, the doctor summons McKay’s sister to say her goodbyes. But Ronan tells Jeannie of a shrine that would grant Rodney one day to be himself again, before he dies.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Rex (Neil Roberts) gets Prue (Shannen Doherty) a locket that harbors the evil warlock Matthew (guest star Matthew Tate), Matthew takes Prue’s powers and sets out for the other sisters.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Rex (guest star Neil Roberts) and Hannah (guest star Leigh- Allyn Baker) set out to destroy the sisters Halliwell and frame Prue (Shannen Doherty) for murder while angering her by Rex dating Phoebe (Alyssa Milano).

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe’s old flame Clay comes to town after he and his partners steal a valuable urn that is guarded by a demon, putting Prue in jeopardy after Clay gets Phoebe to ask Prue to help sell the urn.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is almost killed by a beast, she notices a strange transformation she begins to make – all similar traits to her attacker. Meanwhile, Phoebe works as Prue’s assistant and tries to help a family reunite after a premonition.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: On the eve of another Friday the 13th, the sisters learn of a demon (guest star Billy Drago) who kills witches after discovering their deepest fears. Now, he’s after Prue (Shannen Doherty) since discovering her fear of water.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help a young boy (guest star David Netter), who’s received his mother’s witch powers after two thugs (guest stars Brad Tatum and Will Stewart) kidnap him to use his powers for their evil gain.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An earthquake unearths a shadowy evil Woogy who promptly takes over the gasman on the Halliwell premises who promptly takes over Phoebe, who as a child most feared the Woogyman the girls’ grandma always talked about.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A dangerous mortal (guest star Alex McArthur) uses a crystal sword to suck powers out of people and targets Prue (Shannen Doherty) as his next victim. To help combat him, Prue casts a spell to strengthen her powers, only it ends up cloning her twice.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After a run in with a demon who’s responsible for the death of the sisters’ mother, Prue, Piper and Phoebe are transported back to the 1970’s after casting a spell to try to prevent her death and their loss of powers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue (Shannen Doherty) tries to help Brendan (guest star Michael Weatherly) who’s two brothers (guest stars David Kriegel and Nick Kokotakis) are evil warlocks that attempt to convert him as well, forming the Evil Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After the Halliwell sisters witness the kidnapping of Piper’s (Holly Marie Combs) friend (guest star Maureen Muldoon) son (guest star Scott Tera), they discover it’s the work of the Grimlocks, demons who take the sight away from young boys.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper leaves town for a convention, Prue and Phoebe discover a long-dead convict has been brought to life as a ghost and is murdering people who had anything to do with his conviction.

programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le da un regalo a su hijo cuando vuelve a encontrarse con Norma en los límites de la hacienda, ella no esconde sus sentimientos. Ruth desafía a su madre y comienza a trabajar con Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma descubre que su bebé no tiene la cadena que le regaló Juan y se enfrenta con Gabriela, mientras que Martín le aconseja que vuelva con el padre de su hijo. Armando se enfurece con Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando asume el cargo de administrador de la hacienda Elizondo, tanto Norma como Juan desconfían de sus intenciones. Óscar pide ser el galán del comercial de Jimena y Rosario busca a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere que sus hermanos conozcan a su hijo, Norma no se opone y tiene una dura discusión con Gabriela. En la filmación del comercial, Jimena ve que el galán es Óscar, él la secuestra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma decide bautizar al bebé y le dice a Juan que se llamará Juan David, después del bautizo él le presenta su hijo a todos los empleados. Gabriela interroga a Fernando sobre Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le aconseja a Norma que se case con Juan, quien sueña vivir con ella y el niño como una familia. Rosario se le atraviesa con el carro a Franco y él la rechaza, Gabriela pacta con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario se propone reconquistar a Franco, lo que ella no sabe es que Armando piensa en acabar con él en la fiesta. A las hijas y al padre de Gabriela les extraña su nueva amistad con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
